01C.name: 01C - USC South Campus to Pier 3

fare_estimate.note: ₱13 for the first 4km; additional fare applies per km beyond that.

tips: This is a loop route, so it can be used in both directions.
Board near USC South Campus for easy entry.
Say 'Lugar lang' or tap the rail when approaching your stop.
Route passes through: Leon Kilat, Colon, General Maxilom.
